source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explainfor_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28580 

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explainfor_test.go.
fix_pattern: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explainfor_test.go
